segments.text: Alright, jab jab into up B!
With Sonic's light weight, it's pretty risky
segments.original_text: ソニックの体重だとかなり心もとない

segments.text: The ledge situation isn't just about staying grabbed
segments.original_text: 崖の展開は捕まりっぱなしには

segments.text: And going around the back with up tilt to dair
segments.original_text: そして裏が回ったところ上強で下出をと

full_text: Alright, jab jab into up B! Up tilt pressure at 123 percent! With Sonic's light weight, it's pretty risky The ledge situation isn't just about staying grabbed He handles it properly And going around the back with up tilt to dair
